title: atalantia longipedunculata
intro: Atalantia longipedunculata, also known as the long peduncle atalantia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Atalantia longipedunculata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antioxidant properties, thereby protecting the body from oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Atalantia longipedunculata are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including digestive issues, skin infections, and wounds.
